PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Continued To Oct-21-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Akiko Takeshita for Charlene Ng.

The Court informed Counsel that disclaimers were needed from the two Siblings, that they need to be clear as to the percentages they are disclaiming, and not to use property taxes or interest. The Fourth Amended Spousal Property Petition was continued to October 21, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Anne Bouliane. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Continued To Sep-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Akiko Takeshita for Charlene Ng.

Ms. Takeshita stated that she has been having difficulty with her Client, that her Client has been trying to clean out the house, that the house is in the Decedent's name and was obtained prior to her Client's involvment, and that she has documents regarding the dissolution of the Decedent's first marriage. Ms. Takeshita also raised the issue of Quasi Marriage and community proper, and stated that she can file the petition correctly in a fourth amendment. The Court will give Counsel one more opportunity to file the petition properly in all respects. The Petition for Spousal Property was continued to September 30, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the fourth amended petition.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)
